sections.title: Overview & Pathophysiology
sections.content: **Cellulitis vs Necrotizing Fasciitis** — This section covers the fundamental pathophysiology, epidemiology, and clinical significance. Understanding the underlying mechanisms is essential for clinical reasoning and evidence-based management.

sections.title: Management & Treatment

reviewQuestions.question: Which of the following is the MOST important initial step in evaluating a patient with suspected Cellulitis vs Necrotizing Fasciitis?
options: Obtain a thorough history and physical examination

reviewQuestions.explanation: A thorough history and physical examination is always the cornerstone of clinical evaluation for Cellulitis vs Necrotizing Fasciitis, guiding subsequent diagnostic workup and management decisions.

reviewQuestions.question: What is the MOST critical factor in determining the management approach for Cellulitis vs Necrotizing Fasciitis?
reviewQuestions.explanation: Clinical severity and appropriate risk stratification guide management decisions in Cellulitis vs Necrotizing Fasciitis, determining the level of intervention and monitoring required.

reviewQuestions.question: Which complication of Cellulitis vs Necrotizing Fasciitis requires the MOST urgent intervention?
reviewQuestions.explanation: Hemodynamic instability in the setting of Cellulitis vs Necrotizing Fasciitis requires immediate intervention including fluid resuscitation, close monitoring, and potentially escalation to critical care.
